title: Jamaican Chicken Curry
description: A flavorful and spicy Jamaican-inspired curry dish made with chicken, mildly spicy ingredients, and a blend of aromatic spices.
instructions: 1. Heat oil in a large pan over medium-high heat.
2. Add the onion and garlic and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
3. Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5-6 minutes.
4. Add the curry powder and paste and cook for 1-2 minutes.
5. Add the diced tomatoes, coconut milk, salt, and pepper. Stir well to combine.
6. Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through.
7. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
8. Serve hot over rice or with naan bread.
